rationale: The skill invokes the firecrawl CLI (or npx firecrawl) to scrape arbitrary user-provided URLs, so the subprocess fans out to any host on the web while the CLI itself talks to api.firecrawl.dev. Output is written to ./.firecrawl/ files (per the naming convention and -o flags), and the tips suggest reading those files back with grep/head. No deletions are described.
